headline: Assessing Axon Enterprise (AXON) Valuation After A Sharp Year To Date Share Price Decline
summary: Axon Enterprise overview and recent stock performance Axon Enterprise (AXON) stock has been under pressure recently, with a 3.3% one day decline and negative returns over the past week, month, and past 3 months, bringing the year to date move to a 32.5% decline.
